notes: The engineering layer respects the three commentarial readings of 2.37 without conflation: Shankara's concession-argument reading (granting Arjuna's worldly frame, both branches are wins), Ramanuja's niṣkāma-karma foreshadow reading (the symmetry holds because the action is detached from fruits), and Sridhara's direct-closure-of-2.6 reading (the dilemma Arjuna constructed at 2.6 is dissolved). The source pack labels each by tradition (Advaita, Vishishtadvaita, Rudra Sampradaya, Gaudiya Vaishnava). The engineering layer foreground's Sridhara's reading (the dilemma was constructed) and quietly honors Ramanuja's reading via the falsifiability (the symmetry depends on the action being technically prepared — i.e., the act being structured as karma-yoga). The disagreements_among_translators field explicitly names the three positions and explains what argumentative work each is doing. PASS.
